title: The Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1973 (12.06.1973)
text: REGISTERED No. D. 221 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (I) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No , 142] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, JUNE 12, 1973/JYAISTHA 21,1895 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation. MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th June, 1973 G.S.R, 310 (E).—-In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967) the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, Namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Amendment) Rules, 1973. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette 2. In Schedule V to the Passports Rules, 1967, after S. No. 12 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be inserted, namely:— I "13 14 15 2 Issue of a duplicate passport in lieu of the India-Bangladesh Passport which has been lost, stolen, damaged or destroyed Miscellaneous service on an India-Bangladesh Passport . Rs Issue of a new Passport Booklet when all the pages in an existing India-Bangladesh Passport are exhausted. 3 Rs. 10-00 . 2 0 0 per service. Rs. 2-00" [No. VI/401/50/72] AVTAR SINGH, Secy (927 ) -- 1 of 2 -- 918 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] PRINTED BY THB MANAGER, GOVERNMENT OP INDIA PRE8S, MINTO ROAD, NEW DELHI AND PUBLISHED BY THE CONTROLLER OF PUBLICATIONS, DELHI, 1 9 7 3 -- 2 of 2 --
